full_text:
Pang Shanmin 龐山民
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Shanmin (龐山民)was born in Nan. Married a younger sister of Zhuge Liang and served Wei. Pang Shanmin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
